lineage.Process: DefineProjection \\Gx-1\f\2024建成区\郭晓青\防城港市\2-过程数据\3-建成区\2024建成区.shp PROJCS['CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_108E',GEOGCS['GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000',DATUM['D_China_2000',SPHEROID['CGCS2000',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Gauss_Kruger'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',500000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',108.0],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',0.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]]

Project 2024建成区 \\Gx-1\f\2024建成区\郭晓青\防城港市\2-过程数据\3-建成区\2024建成区投影.shp PROJCS['CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_108E',GEOGCS['GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000',DATUM['D_China_2000',SPHEROID['CGCS2000',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Gauss_Kruger'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',500000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',108.0],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',0.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] # GEOGCS['GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000',DATUM['D_China_2000',SPHEROID['CGCS2000',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL
